Home / Blog

Hello, World!

March 21, 2026

Why a Blog?

I've been meaning to write more for a while. Up to this point, this site has been a static page — a CV with links — but I want a place to think through ideas in public.

My goal is to write about whatever comes to me and piques my interest. I expect that my first few posts will be a bit rough, and that's okay. I am being intentional about cultivating high follow-through; I am not letting perfect be the enemy of good.

What to Expect

Posts will be irregular. I'm not committing to a schedule, just to writing when there's something worth saying.

If you have thoughts on anything I post, or just want to say hi, please reach out via email.

Want to get updates from me? Drop your email below!
